title: OG Paintings
description: Restore the former glory of paintings!
body:
# OG Paintings

A texture pack that replaces the downscaled and modified paintings of Minecraft with their original high-definition, uncropped (where applicable) versions by [Kristoffer Zetterstrand](https://zetterstrand.com/)

### Notes
- The wither painting has been replaced by a self-portrait of the artist
- Creebet and Pigscene are based off of the high-res originals but have the mob heads pasted on them just like in vanilla
- Some paintings have been cropped to the aspect ratio that's used in-game
- The texture pack has been processed with [PackSquash](https://github.com/ComunidadAylas/PackSquash) prior to upload due to its ridiculous size ( 74.8 MB -> 25.5 MB ). The dithering effect used to reduce the size of the images may be noticeable from up close
- The image sources are the same as mentioned on the [wiki page](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Painting#Canvases)
- Frame borders have been omitted. Might add them in a future release
- If you'd like more consistency and parity with the vanilla textures check out [HD Paintings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/hd-paintings)
